metadata.description: Workshop marketplace. Two variants of the dev-workflow plugin: prd-pr-copilot (Copilot CLI, orchestrator entry skill + .agent.md subagents) and prd-pr-claude (Claude Code, orchestrator skill + .md subagents).

plugins.name: prd-pr-copilot
plugins.description: Copilot CLI variant — AI-assisted developer workflow with vertical-slice architecture, slice-by-slice implementation, and ADO task creation. Entry skill: orchestrator. Agents use Copilot's .agent.md format.

plugins.name: prd-pr-claude
plugins.description: Claude Code variant — orchestrator skill (workshop-dev-workflow) drives the full plan-then-build flow in the main session, dispatching helper subagents (code-explorer, code-architect, plan-reviewer, impl-backend, impl-frontend, impl-simplify) as needed.
